headline: Terms and conditions

full_text: Thank you for visiting the Metro.co.uk website (the “Site”). By using this Site, you accept these Terms and Conditions (“Terms”). If you do not accept these Terms, do not use this Site. We may change these Terms from time to time, so you should review them each time that you visit the Site. You should print a copy of these Terms for future reference. General terms 1. About us 2. Using our Site 3. Third party content and links available on this Site 4. Your personal information 5. Our liability 6. Maintenance of the Site 7. Validity of these terms 8. Jurisdiction and applicable law Registration specific terms 9. Registration 10. Your Content – what we are allowed to do 11. Your Content – what you are not allowed to do 12. Suspending or terminating your registration 1.
